debug_info.goal:
A : Finset ℕ
N : ℕ
hAN : A ⊆ range N
hA : ThreeAPFree ↑A
⊢ ∃ c > 0, ↑A.card ≤ ↑N / exp (-c * log ↑N ^ 12⁻¹)

proof:
by
  refine ⟨1, one_pos, ?_⟩
  by_cases hN : N = 0
  · subst hN
    simp only [range_zero, subset_empty] at hAN
    simp [hAN]
  have hN' : 0 < N := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hN
  have hAN' : #A ≤ N := (card_le_card hAN).trans_eq (card_range N)
  have hN1 : 1 ≤ (N : ℝ) := Nat.one_le_cast.mpr hN'
  have h : 0 ≤ log (N : ℝ) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ) := rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg hN1) _
  have hexp_le : exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) ≤ 1 := 
    exp_le_one_iff.mpr (by rw [neg_one_mul]; linarith)
  calc (#A : ℝ) ≤ N := Nat.cast_le.mpr hAN'
    _ = N / 1 := (div_one _).symm
    _ ≤ N / exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := 
        div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (exp_pos _) hexp_le
successful_attempts:
by
  refine ⟨1, one_pos, ?_⟩
  by_cases hN : N = 0
  · subst hN
    simp only [range_zero, subset_empty] at hAN

  have hN' : 0 < N := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hN
  have hAN' : #A ≤ N := (card_le_card hAN).trans_eq (card_range N)
  have hN1 : 1 ≤ (N : ℝ) := Nat.one_le_cast.mpr hN'
  have h : 0 ≤ log (N : ℝ) ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ) := rpow_nonneg (log_nonneg hN1) _
  have hexp_le : exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) ≤ 1 := 
    exp_le_one_iff.mpr (by rw [neg_one_mul]; linarith)
  calc (#A : ℝ) ≤ N := Nat.cast_le.mpr hAN'
    _ = N / 1 := (div_one _).symm
    _ ≤ N / exp (-1 * log ↑N ^ (12⁻¹ : ℝ)) := 
        div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (exp_pos _) hexp_le
